label: Stat part (not carefully slaughtered)
description: Applies a penalty factor when the animal was not carefully slaughtered.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

factor.label: Factor
factor.description: Stat multiplier applied when the pawn was not carefully slaughtered.
